brief: Today's news spans political maneuvering, infrastructure disputes, natural disasters, and AI controversies, while research papers explore visual analytics, human-computer interaction, and cultural heritage.
news_summary: Key stories include the opening of a US-Canada bridge despite Trump's opposition, Meta's AI feature pull, and a devastating Venezuela earthquake.
papers_summary: Papers on missing data imputation, crime linkage AI, and visualization incentives highlight advances in human-centered computing.

en.brief: Today's news spans political maneuvering, infrastructure disputes, natural disasters, and AI controversies, while research papers explore visual analytics, human-computer interaction, and cultural heritage.
en.news_summary: Key stories include the opening of a US-Canada bridge despite Trump's opposition, Meta's AI feature pull, and a devastating Venezuela earthquake.
en.papers_summary: Papers on missing data imputation, crime linkage AI, and visualization incentives highlight advances in human-centered computing.

zh.brief: 今日焦点包括福建鞋厂大火致28死，当局展开追责；一名母亲长期虚构子女疾病被揭发；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴涉人口贩运；美伊冲突持续。学术方面无中文论文，但全球研究关注AI在视觉分析、手语识别等领域的应用。
zh.news_summary: 福建晋江鞋厂火灾造成28人死亡，习近平要求严肃追责；BBC中文揭露两起儿童虐待案：新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴疑涉人口贩运，以及母亲多年虚构女儿重病进行精神虐待；美伊互相发动攻击，哈梅内伊下葬期间冲突升级。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先中文论文，但全球研究涉及AI在犯罪关联分析、脑机接口临床转化、传统中国画可视化等领域的应用。

todays_image.caption: The garden bridge design embodies an unimpeded creative vision, much like the new Detroit-Canada bridge opening despite political obstruction.
todays_image.title: Design for Bridge in Garden Pavilion
